mapper.select: SELECT * FROM xe_khach ORDER BY ma DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO xe_khach (ma_loai_xe, bien_so, hang_xe, so_cho, hoat_dong) VALUES (#{maLoaiXe}, #{bienSo}, #{hangXe}, #{soCho}, #{hoatDong})
mapper.update: UPDATE xe_khach SET ma_loai_xe = #{maLoaiXe}, bien_so = #{bienSo}, hang_xe = #{hangXe}, so_cho = #{soCho}, hoat_dong = #{hoatDong} WHERE ma = #{ma}
